{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Internal Control Lead",
  "description": "We are Animal Care Service Konsult Nigeria Limited, an agro-allied company specializing in livestock farming, feed milling, technical laboratory services, and marketing of Animal Health products &amp; Poultry equipment. Committed to animal health and production, we strive to be the leading operator in Nigeria&#39;s livestock industry.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Internal Control Lead

Job Location:&nbsp;Ogere, Remo - Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Summary


	The Internal Control Lead will be responsible for designing, implementing, and monitoring internal control systems across the organization to ensure operational efficiency, financial accuracy, and compliance with regulatory requirements.
	This role requires a detail-oriented professional with strong analytical skills and a solid background in internal control, audit, or risk management&mdash;preferably within the FMCG or Agro-Allied sector.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop, implement, and continuously improve internal control policies, procedures, and frameworks.
	Conduct periodic risk assessments and identify control gaps across all business processes.
	Review financial transactions and operational activities to ensure compliance with internal policies and external regulations.
	Lead investigations of control breaches, irregularities, or non-compliance issues.
	Work closely with cross-functional teams to strengthen process controls and ensure corrective actions are implemented.
	Prepare and present internal control reports to management with recommendations for improvement.
	Support external and internal audit exercises, ensuring all findings are promptly addressed.
	Train staff on internal control processes and promote a strong culture of compliance.


Qualifications &amp; Experience


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Accounting, Banking &amp; Finance, Economics, or related field with&nbsp;3&ndash;5 years&rsquo; experience in internal control, audit, or risk management.
	Professional certification such as ACA, ACCA, CIA, or CISA (mandatory or strongly preferred).
	Experience in manufacturing, FMCG, or Agro-Allied industry is a strong advantage.
	Solid understanding of internal control frameworks (COSO, ICOFR).
	Strong analytical, investigative, and report-writing skills.
	High level of integrity, confidentiality, and ethical standards.
	Proficiency in ERP systems and Microsoft Office applications.


What We Offer


	Competitive salary and benefits package.
	Opportunities for professional development and career growth.
	Supportive and collaborative work environment.
	Chance to contribute to a mission-driven organization focused on agricultural transformation.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to &quot;Human Resources &amp;&nbsp;Admin&quot; via:&nbsp;recruitment@animalcare-ng.com&nbsp;using the Job Position applied for as the subject of the email.",

Internal Control Lead Job at Animal Care Service Konsult Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        We are Animal Care Service Konsult Nigeria Limited, an agro-allied company specializing in livestock farming, feed milling, technical laboratory services, and marketing of Animal Health products & Poultry equipment. Committed to animal health and production, we strive to be the leading operator in Nigeria's livestock industry.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Internal Control Lead

Job Location: Ogere, Remo - Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Internal Control Lead will be responsible for designing, implementing, and monitoring internal control systems across the organization to ensure operational efficiency, financial accuracy, and compliance with regulatory requirements.
	This role requires a detail-oriented professional with strong analytical skills and a solid background in internal control, audit, or risk management—preferably within the FMCG or Agro-Allied sector.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop, implement, and continuously improve internal control policies, procedures, and frameworks.
	Conduct periodic risk assessments and identify control gaps across all business processes.
	Review financial transactions and operational activities to ensure compliance with internal policies and external regulations.
	Lead investigations of control breaches, irregularities, or non-compliance issues.
	Work closely with cross-functional teams to strengthen process controls and ensure corrective actions are implemented.
	Prepare and present internal control reports to management with recommendations for improvement.
	Support external and internal audit exercises, ensuring all findings are promptly addressed.
	Train staff on internal control processes and promote a strong culture of compliance.


Qualifications & Experience


	Bachelor’s Degree in Accounting, Banking & Finance, Economics, or related field with 3–5 years’ experience in internal control, audit, or risk management.
	Professional certification such as ACA, ACCA, CIA, or CISA (mandatory or strongly preferred).
	Experience in manufacturing, FMCG, or Agro-Allied industry is a strong advantage.
	Solid understanding of internal control frameworks (COSO, ICOFR).
	Strong analytical, investigative, and report-writing skills.
	High level of integrity, confidentiality, and ethical standards.
	Proficiency in ERP systems and Microsoft Office applications.


What We Offer


	Competitive salary and benefits package.
	Opportunities for professional development and career growth.
	Supportive and collaborative work environment.
	Chance to contribute to a mission-driven organization focused on agricultural transformation.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to "Human Resources & Admin" via: [email protected] using the Job Position applied for as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Key Account Operator",
  "description": "PalmPay is an Africa-focused fintech firm, launched in 2019. PalmPay is a mobile payments platform that offers a number of financial services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Key Account Operator

Job Location: Lagos

Overview


	Responsible for the operation and service management of key merchants and strategic accounts.
	Through deep collaboration and customized solutions, this role aims to increase transaction volume and strengthen long-term partnerships with key clients.


Key Responsibilities


	Manage daily operations and service support for key merchants and strategic clients, maintaining long-term relationships.
	Gain a deep understanding of client business models and needs, and provide customized payment solutions.
	Identify transaction growth opportunities through data analysis and drive client transaction expansion.
	Coordinate internal resources to resolve client issues, including device support, settlement processes, and system-related problems.
	Conduct regular client visits and business reviews to continuously optimize collaboration models.
	Monitor client transaction data and key performance indicators to ensure stable growth.
	Collect client feedback and drive product and service improvements.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree or above, with at least 3 years of experience in payments, internet, or financial services account operations.
	Strong client relationship management and communication skills.
	Familiar with payment industry processes or acquiring business operations.
	Strong problem-solving and project management abilities.
	Able to work under pressure and maintain a results-oriented mindset.


Preferred Qualifications:


	Experience managing large merchants or chain clients.
	Background in payments or fintech industries.

Key Account Operator Job at PalmPay




        
    

        
        PalmPay is an Africa-focused fintech firm, launched in 2019. PalmPay is a mobile payments platform that offers a number of financial services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Key Account Operator

Job Location: Lagos

Overview


	Responsible for the operation and service management of key merchants and strategic accounts.
	Through deep collaboration and customized solutions, this role aims to increase transaction volume and strengthen long-term partnerships with key clients.


Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Manage daily operations and service support for key merchants and strategic clients, maintaining long-term relationships.
	Gain a deep understanding of client business models and needs, and provide customized payment solutions.
	Identify transaction growth opportunities through data analysis and drive client transaction expansion.
	Coordinate internal resources to resolve client issues, including device support, settlement processes, and system-related problems.
	Conduct regular client visits and business reviews to continuously optimize collaboration models.
	Monitor client transaction data and key performance indicators to ensure stable growth.
	Collect client feedback and drive product and service improvements.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree or above, with at least 3 years of experience in payments, internet, or financial services account operations.
	Strong client relationship management and communication skills.
	Familiar with payment industry processes or acquiring business operations.
	Strong problem-solving and project management abilities.
	Able to work under pressure and maintain a results-oriented mindset.


Preferred Qualifications:


	Experience managing large merchants or chain clients.
	Background in payments or fintech industries.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "title": "Operations Manager",
  "description": "Prixair Group is a diversified Nigerian Companyheadquartered in Abuja.The Group operates across multiple sectors, including Solid minerals mining, hospitality, Media, supermarkets, laundry and Cleaning services, and restaurants (food services). Through its portfolio of businesses, Prixair focuses on delivering quality products and services while driving innovation, operational excellence, and customer-focused experiences across Nigeria. Guided by its core values of knowledge, integrity, teamwork, innovation, and professionalism, the Group continues to expand its footprint, with a vision to become a global enterprise providing quality services and solutions.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Operations Manager, Laundry and Drycleaning

Job Location:&nbsp;Gaduwa, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

About the Role


	Prixair Group is seeking a highly experienced and hands-on Laundry &amp; Dry Cleaning Manager to lead the operations of our professional laundry and dry-cleaning business.
	The ideal candidate will have strong technical knowledge of modern laundry and dry-cleaning processes, excellent operational management skills, and the ability to lead a team that delivers high-quality garment care and excellent customer service.


Key Responsibilities


	Oversee the daily operationsof the laundry and dry-cleaning unit.
	Ensure proper garment handling, washing, stain treatment, drying, and finishingin line with professional standards.
	Supervise and coordinate laundry staff to ensure efficiency and quality service delivery.
	Maintain quality control standardsto prevent garment damage and ensure customer satisfaction.
	Manage equipment operation, maintenance, and safety procedures.
	Monitor inventory of detergents, chemicals, packaging materials, and other consumables.
	Implement efficient workflow and turnaround systemsto meet delivery timelines.
	Handle customer complaints and ensure prompt resolution.
	Train and develop staff on professional laundry techniques and service standards.
	Prepare periodic reports on operational performance.


Requirements


	Minimum qualification:Ordinary National Diploma (OND) or equivalent.
	Minimum of 7 years&rsquo; experiencein a professional laundry and dry-cleaning business, with strong operational exposure.
	Demonstrated experience managing or supervising laundry operations.
	Strong knowledge of fabric care, stain removal techniques, and dry-cleaning processes.
	Ability to manage teams and maintain high service standards.
	Good organizational and problem-solving skills.
	Strong sense of responsibility, professionalism, and attention to detail.


Key Competencies:


	Laundry &amp; Dry Cleaning Operations Management
	Fabric Care and Quality Control
	Staff Supervision and Training
	Customer Service Excellence
	Equipment Handling and Safety Compliance.


Salary
N150,000 - N200,000 per month.

Method of Application&nbsp;

Operations Manager Job at Prixair Group




        
    

        
        Prixair Group is a diversified Nigerian Companyheadquartered in Abuja.The Group operates across multiple sectors, including Solid minerals mining, hospitality, Media, supermarkets, laundry and Cleaning services, and restaurants (food services). Through its portfolio of businesses, Prixair focuses on delivering quality products and services while driving innovation, operational excellence, and customer-focused experiences across Nigeria. Guided by its core values of knowledge, integrity, teamwork, innovation, and professionalism, the Group continues to expand its footprint, with a vision to become a global enterprise providing quality services and solutions.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Position: Operations Manager, Laundry and Drycleaning

Job Location: Gaduwa, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

About the Role


	Prixair Group is seeking a highly experienced and hands-on Laundry & Dry Cleaning Manager to lead the operations of our professional laundry and dry-cleaning business.
	The ideal candidate will have strong technical knowledge of modern laundry and dry-cleaning processes, excellent operational management skills, and the ability to lead a team that delivers high-quality garment care and excellent customer service.


Key Responsibilities


	Oversee the daily operationsof the laundry and dry-cleaning unit.
	Ensure proper garment handling, washing, stain treatment, drying, and finishingin line with professional standards.
	Supervise and coordinate laundry staff to ensure efficiency and quality service delivery.
	Maintain quality control standardsto prevent garment damage and ensure customer satisfaction.
	Manage equipment operation, maintenance, and safety procedures.
	Monitor inventory of detergents, chemicals, packaging materials, and other consumables.
	Implement efficient workflow and turnaround systemsto meet delivery timelines.
	Handle customer complaints and ensure prompt resolution.
	Train and develop staff on professional laundry techniques and service standards.
	Prepare periodic reports on operational performance.


Requirements


	Minimum qualification:Ordinary National Diploma (OND) or equivalent.
	Minimum of 7 years’ experiencein a professional laundry and dry-cleaning business, with strong operational exposure.
	Demonstrated experience managing or supervising laundry operations.
	Strong knowledge of fabric care, stain removal techniques, and dry-cleaning processes.
	Ability to manage teams and maintain high service standards.
	Good organizational and problem-solving skills.
	Strong sense of responsibility, professionalism, and attention to detail.


Key Competencies:


	Laundry & Dry Cleaning Operations Management
	Fabric Care and Quality Control
	Staff Supervision and Training
	Customer Service Excellence
	Equipment Handling and Safety Compliance.


Salary
N150,000 - N200,000 per month.

Method of Application

  "title": "Digital Marketer and Content Creator",
  "description": "Kayode Obembe Properties Limited is a real estate firm incorporated and registered in Nigeria as a limited liability company. The company, which started operations in 2006 as a modest property agent firm as grown tremendously into a formidable real estate development and management company.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Digital Marketer and Content Creator

Job Location:&nbsp;Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We are seeking a creative Social Media / Digital Marketer to drive our online presence and lead generation efforts.
	You will manage campaigns, run targeted ads, and create engaging content to attract and retain wellness clients.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and execute social media campaigns across platforms (Instagram, X, TikTok, Facebook etc).
	Run paid ads to generate leads and increase program sign-ups.
	Create engaging content including graphics, videos, and posts.
	Monitor campaign performance and optimize strategies based on analytics.
	Onsite job role.


Requirements


	Experience: 2-3 years of work experience
	Proven experience in social media marketing and digital advertising.
	Knowledge of ad platforms (Meta Ads Manager, Google Ads, TikTok Ads, etc.).
	Strong content creation and copywriting skills.
	Ability to analyze metrics and adjust campaigns for maximum ROI.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;recruitment4kayodeobembepro@gmail.com&nbsp;using &ldquo;Social Media / Digital Marketer / Content Creation&rdquo; as the subject of the mail.",

Digital Marketer and Content Creator Job at Kayode Obembe Properties Limited




        
    

        
        Kayode Obembe Properties Limited is a real estate firm incorporated and registered in Nigeria as a limited liability company. The company, which started operations in 2006 as a modest property agent firm as grown tremendously into a formidable real estate development and management company.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Digital Marketer and Content Creator

Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a creative Social Media / Digital Marketer to drive our online presence and lead generation efforts.
	You will manage campaigns, run targeted ads, and create engaging content to attract and retain wellness clients.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and execute social media campaigns across platforms (Instagram, X, TikTok, Facebook etc).
	Run paid ads to generate leads and increase program sign-ups.
	Create engaging content including graphics, videos, and posts.
	Monitor campaign performance and optimize strategies based on analytics.
	Onsite job role.


Requirements


	Experience: 2-3 years of work experience
	Proven experience in social media marketing and digital advertising.
	Knowledge of ad platforms (Meta Ads Manager, Google Ads, TikTok Ads, etc.).
	Strong content creation and copywriting skills.
	Ability to analyze metrics and adjust campaigns for maximum ROI.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using “Social Media / Digital Marketer / Content Creation” as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Industrial Electrician",
  "description": "Ascentech Services Limited is the most sought-after Human Resource Solution Provider with its Head Office in Lagos, Nigeria. We have a reputation for satisfying and surpassing clients expectations through our core offerings: Recruitment and Selection, Outsourcing, Training and Development. To accomplish these we leverage on creating and managing change in organizations by improving efficiency through our proven and dynamic HR solutions.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Industrial Electrician

Job Location:&nbsp;Ogere, Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	An Industrial Electrician installs, maintains, troubleshoots, and repairs electrical systems and equipment in industrial facilities such as factories, power plants, and production plants.
	The role ensures electrical systems operate safely, efficiently, and with minimal downtime.


Key Responsibilities


	Install electrical wiring, motors, control panels, transformers, and industrial equipment.
	Perform preventive maintenance on electrical systems and machinery.
	Troubleshoot and repair electrical faults in motors, generators, and control circuits.
	Install and maintain electrical control systems and PLC-based automation.
	Use testing tools such as multimeters, clamp meters, and insulation testers.
	Follow electrical safety procedures and industrial regulations.
	Read and interpret electrical diagrams, blueprints, and schematics.
	Maintain maintenance and repair records.


Qualifications


	Diploma or technical certificate in Electrical Engineering, Electrical Technology, or Industrial Electrical Maintenance.


Required Skills


	Knowledge of industrial electrical systems and motor control circuits.
	Ability to read electrical schematics and wiring diagrams.
	Strong troubleshooting and problem-solving skills.
	Understanding of PLC and industrial automation systems.
	Good safety awareness.


Experience


	2&ndash;5 years of experience in industrial electrical work, preferably in manufacturing, power plants, or heavy industry.


Work Environment:


	Industrial plants and factories.
	May involve working with high-voltage equipment and rotating machinery.
	Requires use of Personal Protective Equipment (PPE) and may include shift work or emergency repairs.


Salary
N150,000.00 monthly + transport.

Industrial Electrician Job at Ascentech Services Limited




        
    

        
        Ascentech Services Limited is the most sought-after Human Resource Solution Provider with its Head Office in Lagos, Nigeria. We have a reputation for satisfying and surpassing clients expectations through our core offerings: Recruitment and Selection, Outsourcing, Training and Development. To accomplish these we leverage on creating and managing change in organizations by improving efficiency through our proven and dynamic HR solutions.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Industrial Electrician

Job Location: Ogere, Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	An Industrial Electrician installs, maintains, troubleshoots, and repairs electrical systems and equipment in industrial facilities such as factories, power plants, and production plants.
	The role ensures electrical systems operate safely, efficiently, and with minimal downtime.


Key Responsibilities


	Install electrical wiring, motors, control panels, transformers, and industrial equipment.
	Perform preventive maintenance on electrical systems and machinery.
	Troubleshoot and repair electrical faults in motors, generators, and control circuits.
	Install and maintain electrical control systems and PLC-based automation.
	Use testing tools such as multimeters, clamp meters, and insulation testers.
	Follow electrical safety procedures and industrial regulations.
	Read and interpret electrical diagrams, blueprints, and schematics.
	Maintain maintenance and repair records.


Qualifications


	Diploma or technical certificate in Electrical Engineering, Electrical Technology, or Industrial Electrical Maintenance.


Required Skills


	Knowledge of industrial electrical systems and motor control circuits.
	Ability to read electrical schematics and wiring diagrams.
	Strong troubleshooting and problem-solving skills.
	Understanding of PLC and industrial automation systems.
	Good safety awareness.


Experience


	2–5 years of experience in industrial electrical work, preferably in manufacturing, power plants, or heavy industry.


Work Environment:


	Industrial plants and factories.
	May involve working with high-voltage equipment and rotating machinery.
	Requires use of Personal Protective Equipment (PPE) and may include shift work or emergency repairs.


Salary
N150,000.00 monthly + transport.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.
